description: We are gaining capacity in areas we don't normally move freight - which grows our book of business
author: Michael B.
pros: The loadboard brings us capacity when we don't have it in our current network
cons: The API integration is relatively good, but could be improved in many ways

review_title: Good, but need to listen more to shippers
description: Pretty good. I love the visuals, easier logins now. I really feel like there are still gaps on how to use the data in a way that meets my business needs.
author: Laura E.
pros: I love the lane by lane data, it helps take market insight and really drill down to what my organization is seeing that might be different due to volume/lane/mode mix...vs what the C-suite may be hearing generally.
cons: Im pretty irritated I dont get the rateview future rates in a data set. I would have to look up one by one, and then my success manager started out with I would have to pay for it. It seems like there are still gaps in the offering and DAT not understanding how shippers use the data so you can give us better solutions to anticipate use/formats needed.

description: I would say disappointed and irritated. To be totally transparent, every single person at our company using DAT does not like it nor do they understand why anyone would change the DAT Rateview.
author: chase B.
pros: I honestly have nothing positive to say about it. I think it just adds random information that we don't need for pricing and then the actual pricing itself is harder to view.
cons: That I am re-directed to it when trying to access the rate view. It also does not show rates w/o highlighting

review_title: DAT iQ is a great model for transportation benchmarking
description: Very comprehensive modeling and direct feedback into your performance with areas to focus on if you are open to implement that to your network
author: Ronald I.
pros: Immediate (weekly phasing) comparison of actual transportation spending by mode to "market" (statististically-derived modeling), industry verticals, and overall consortium (DAT members)
cons: DAT is working on making the portal more open and available for user to download and analyze. Pricing can be quite high for small entity trying to benchmark its transportation spending

review_title: Highly recommended tool but needs to listen to trusted brokers.
description: I do use daily, to know the market trend, I use it as a tool.
author: Wessam K.
pros: Know the market rates comparted to our budget
cons: Rates are 2 weeks late and sometimes the actual rates not realistic with DAT

review_title: OK system to use, but mostly unreliable data
description: carriers are quoting higher rates for some lanes. need accurate data from carriers
author: Abraham S.
pros: extensive rates, historical data about the lane
cons: Not able to quote LTL or partial truck load rates

review_title: Know your truck & know your numbers
description: I did need some walk-through tutorials and it's very nice that DAT offers these kind of customer service
author: Patrick K.
pros: The ability to get real time data, and check the efficiency of an asset, of a drivers performance, & understanding the numbers for different laned to make profit now, but also in the future
cons: it's a bit pricey for what we get. There are competitors that are up to 50% less, but DAT definitely has brand recognition and is number one in the industry

description: DAT iQ assists me in spot quoting for customers at any given time. It exposes me to carriers that frequently seach or post for a particular lane.
author: William C.
pros: The Dashboard gives me a snapshot of what is happening in the market at any given moment that I login. I can see what is happening around the country, and see what capacity is available in determining rates to customers. Market Conditions tab is probably the second most important feature DAT iQ offers me. Rateview is a lifesaver for instant quotes.
cons: Least favorite aspect of DAT iQ is not being able to find the time to explore everything.

author: Justin R.
pros: DAT provides multiple intelligence solutions that are critical to running our business. The system is very easy to use, utilizes a large sample set of data, and we have found it to be an invaluable resource in all pricing and market intelligence exercises.
cons: DAT is a bit more expensive than alternative solutions but does offer value for the price.

review_title: A lot of useful resources in one spot.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: That it gives you a variety of ways to look at the data that is available.
cons: Seems like the data needs to be updated faster to stay more accurate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent. Ease of use and real time information are essential. DAT checks all the boxes
author: John S.
pros: Fast accurate postings and toolbox options
cons: Would like to see multiple shipping days as opposed to opening multiple searches more than one day

author: William K.
pros: The ease of function and the seamless integration into your operation
cons: The integration was seamless and simple. No complaints.

author: Nick H.
pros: The outbound market conditions index is a game changer for our operations team.
cons: The map in general can be a little generic .

description: Lane average rates are a great way to better understand the market in each region and metro area.
author: Elyse R.
pros: I enjoy being able to see the current rates on lanes and what the industry average is. It is very helpful in my role as an analyst.
cons: No real cons- I've been using the product for years.

author: Jesse R.
pros: East of use and layout of the software in general
cons: When it fails during a work day and we really need the software in order to do our jobs.

author: Michael B.
pros: Rate tools, and other functions that we use
cons: Nope! The product is a great standalone

review_title: Administrator feedback of using DAT last few years
author: Karen L.
pros: The resources that DAT IQ provides is invaluable for what we need to accomplish in our division
cons: Depends but sometimes difficult to get into and access the information that our division needs

description: It has been good, very easy to navigate through and teach new coworkers.
author: Dalton B.
pros: Makes the learning curve much easier for newcomers. Visually very easy to navigate through
cons: I wish there would be more recent zip to zip invoices that could help determine more accurate lane pricing

review_title: DAT is a Great Resource for Brokers
author: Andrew M.
pros: The interface is intuitive and easy to learn. It helps me pull up rates for customers on the fly, even while I'm cold calling, which helps sell price-driven customers.
cons: I wish the charts were easier to read in terms of each bullet point. More specific data is never a bad thing!

author: Alex M.
pros: DAT Ratecast is a solid function that as added recently
cons: When the system crashes this can put brokers in a bad spot
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far it has been very good
author: Madison L.
pros: It’s a better version of original Dat and offers more variety
cons: It’s a little more complicated but you get used to it
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: its good for I can use it for thank you
author: altaff K.
pros: like all the features and insight thank youy
cons: the interface is confusing takes some getting used tothank you
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy to use but the rates are outdated and generally too low
description: I think it is usefull to get and idea of a freight rate but the rate you get is generally wrong. I cannot trust the info
author: Matt C.
pros: Easy to use to get spot rates for hauling. The website is easy to navigate and I like the spot rate tool.
cons: The rates and ranges quoted are outdated and generally too low. The ranges gien are even too low. I get broker rates that are 20% higher

description: I use this program daily, it's a great resource for myself and coworkers. I would definitely notice a change in my daily activities if I did not have DAT iQ.
author: Mike F.
pros: I love the pricing and market information, it's helped me to provide accurate information for myself and customers about market changes.
cons: I can't think of a single feature of DAT iQ that I do not like or isn't useful for me.

description: so far it has been pretty great to use although the older version was more versatile and faster for quick load changes.
author: Matthew B.
pros: fast and easy to view loads on the board
cons: needs a better function for raising rates. make it more streamlined for faster rate changes and seamless functionality
